data.content: I can see the project — the express test expects `15.00m` but the method returns `10.00m`. Let me start `dotnet watch test` so tests re-run automatically when you save changes:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to set up `dotnet watch test` so they can iterate on their failing tests with hot reload. I can see that the express delivery test expects 15.00m but the method returns 10.00m, so that test will fail.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` for them.

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-0ea10484c2b14e85b86c9c5326037366 && dotnet watch test --no-restore 2>&1", "description": "Start dotnet watch test for hot reload", "mode": "async", "shellId": "watch"}
